meaning: n.劳迪西亚(叙利亚最大海港拉塔基亚之古名)
examples: And when this epistle is read among you, cause that it be read also in the church of the Laodiceans; and that ye likewise read the epistle from Laodicea.
The writer says,"When this letter has been read among you, have it read,also,in the church of the Laodiceans, and see that you read,also,the letter from Laodicea."
